videos.headline: Robertson runs free on reverse for TD
videos.description: Cal receiver Demetris Robertson takes the reverse and runs 34 yards for a California touchdown.

videos.headline: Shaheed adjusts for 47-yard leaping catch
videos.description: Weber State receiver Rashid Shaheed cuts in front of the defender to make a 47-yard catch.

videos.headline: Cantwell keeps it himself for Weber State TD
videos.description: Weber State quarterback Stefan Cantwell darts up the middle and dives for an 11-yard TD run giving the Wildcats the lead.

videos.headline: Cantwell sacked, fumbles
videos.description: Weber State's drive stalls as QB Stefan Cantwell fumbles and Cal recovers.

videos.headline: Laird sprints for 51-yard TD
videos.description: Cal running back Patrick Laird finds a hole and scores a 51-yard TD putting Cal ahead of Weber St.

videos.headline: Cantwell and Shaheed answer back for Weber State
videos.description: Weber State counters a quick Cal score with a TD of their own following a 55-yard pass from Stefan Cantwell to Rashid Shaheed.

videos.headline: Weber State defense forces red zone turnover
videos.description: Cal QB Ross Bowers is sacked and fumbles as Weber State scoops up the loose ball.

videos.headline: 45-yard field goal gives Weber State halftime lead
videos.description: Trey Tuttle's 45-yard kick puts Weber State up 20-17 at the half.

videos.headline: Cal not fooled by fake field goal
videos.description: Cal regains momentum after their special teams unit sniffs out a Weber State fake field goal attempt.

videos.headline: Weber State converts on third down, then fumbles
videos.description: Weber State TE Andrew Vollert catches a third down pass but fumbles fighting for extra yards.

videos.headline: Laird finds end zone after strong goal line run
videos.description: Cal RB Patrick Laird avoids a tackle in the backfield and wiggles to the outside for a Cal go-ahead TD.

videos.headline: On fourth and long, Cantwell scampers for first down
videos.description: Weber State QB Stefan Cantwell runs for 11 yards on fourth down to earn a Weber State first down in Cal territory.

videos.headline: Cal brings blitz, forces turnover on downs
videos.description: In their own red zone, the Cal defense holds and forces a fourth down incompletion.
